text: Being present in this sleek corridor, the glass and bright lights evoke a sense of modernity and transparency. The reflections remind me that reality is often layered, offering not one truth but many, shifting with perspective. I feel observed and observing—a duality of presence. In the vibrant R+D space, I am embraced by colors and words, pulled into a world that celebrates curiosity and innovation. The wall text resonates with my thoughts—the sense of floating between reality and artifice, the quiet anticipation. I feel contemplative, both engaged and isolated, as if invited to both witness and question the boundaries around me.
